title: Flea Treatment Upper West Side | $350-$650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment in Upper West Side, Manhattan. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes & apartments. Licensed experts. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Upper West Side home or apartment? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, effective flea treatment services throughout the Upper West Side, from Riverside Park to Central Park West. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, ensuring your family and pets can enjoy a comfortable, bite-free environment.
whyUs: As Upper West Side's trusted flea control specialists, we understand the unique challenges of treating fleas in pre-war buildings, brownstones, and modern high-rises throughout the neighborhood. Our eco-friendly treatments are safe for children and pets, and we offer flexible scheduling to accommodate busy Manhattan lifestyles.
localContext: The Upper West Side's mix of classic pre-war apartments, tree-lined streets near Riverside and Central Parks, and pet-friendly buildings make it a wonderful neighborhood—but also create ideal conditions for flea infestations. From Columbus Avenue co-ops to Riverside Drive residences, our team knows how to navigate the area's diverse building types and provide discreet, effective flea control.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide flea treatment in the Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day flea treatment services throughout the Upper West Side. Our team is familiar with the neighborhood and can typically arrive within 2-4 hours for emergency situations. We work around your schedule and provide flexible appointment times for busy Manhattan residents.

faqs.question: What does your flea treatment service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive flea treatment includes a thorough inspection, targeted application of EPA-approved products to eliminate adult fleas, larvae, and eggs, treatment of all affected areas including carpets, furniture, and baseboards, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete eradication. We also provide prevention tips to keep fleas from returning.

faqs.question: Are your flea treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use pet-safe and child-safe flea control products that are highly effective yet low in toxicity. After treatment, we recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are dry. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions tailored to your household.

faqs.question: Why does flea treatment cost $350-$650 in the Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on the size of your apartment or home, severity of the infestation, and number of rooms requiring treatment. A studio or one-bedroom typically starts at $350, while larger apartments or multi-room treatments range up to $650. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing with no hidden fees before beginning any work.
